author: Neha Kapoor
title: Vitamin C serum caused skin irritation
text: Tried the 10% Vitamin C serum for 2 weeks. After a few days I started getting redness and irritation on my cheeks. Stopped using it and skin returned to normal. When I checked online I found a few people report similar issues suggesting the product may have oxidized. Not happy with this experience.
product: Be Bodywise 10% Vitamin C Face Serum 20ml

author: Ankita Rao
title: Biotin gummies broke me out
text: Started the biotin gummies 3 weeks ago and developed cystic acne on my forehead and cheeks. Had to stop immediately. When I contacted customer care they mentioned this can be an initial purge period but it's been more than 3 weeks now. Very disappointed. The packaging is nice but the product doesn't agree with my skin.
product: Be Bodywise Biotin Hair Gummies 60ct

author: Siddharth Nair
title: Good but leaking packaging
text: The Man Matters hair serum formula seems good and has reduced my hair fall slightly. But the bottle leaked inside the delivery box. The outer packaging was okay but the product bottle had a loose cap. Customer care offered replacement but took 5 days to respond. Product itself 3 stars packaging quality 1 star.
product: Man Matters Advanced Hair Growth Serum 30ml
